prompt:
A close-up of a freshly printed 20 mm calibration cube in a single solid color being measured with digital calipers on a workbench. The cube sits on a small cutting mat or ruler, and the caliper jaws lightly grip one edge, with the display showing an icon-only measurement bar rather than readable numbers. In the background, a 3D printer is slightly out of focus, clearly the machine that produced the cube.

Near-future solarpunk workshop vibe with soft, warm lighting and a couple of tools and plants in the blurred background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos or legible numbers on the calipers. The image should clearly convey the idea of printing and measuring a calibration cube to verify dimensional accuracy.
